domain.name: Organizational Readiness
domain.core_question: Can the organization realistically execute and absorb this AI initiative operationally?
domain.operational_definition: Evaluates the organization's ability to operationalize, absorb, support, and sustain AI-driven workflow or process transformation.

dimensions.name: Change Management Maturity
dimensions.operational_definition: Organization's demonstrated ability to manage workflow and process transformation through structured communication, rollout planning, governance, training, adoption tracking, and organizational support mechanisms.

indicators.label: Formal rollout plan documented
indicators.help_text: A written plan covering sequencing, milestones, dependencies, and target rollout cohorts.

indicators.label: Prior transformation playbook referenced
indicators.help_text: An organizational playbook from previous initiatives is being leveraged for this rollout.

indicators.label: Executive communication strategy defined
indicators.help_text: Cadence, channels, and key messages for executive-level communication during rollout.

indicators.label: Adoption KPIs identified
indicators.help_text: Quantifiable adoption measures (e.g., active users, task completion, behavior change) are documented.

indicators.label: Change champion network established
indicators.help_text: A distributed network of advocates across business units is identified and activated.

indicators.label: Governance review cadence established
indicators.help_text: Recurring governance reviews are scheduled with accountable executives and decision rights defined.

dimensions.name: Stakeholder Alignment
dimensions.operational_definition: Degree of alignment across business, technology, governance, operations, and executive stakeholders regarding initiative objectives, ownership, expected outcomes, and rollout strategy.

indicators.label: Executive sponsor identified
indicators.help_text: A named, accountable executive sponsor with sufficient authority and engagement.

indicators.label: Business owner engaged on outcomes
indicators.help_text: Business owner is actively engaged on outcomes, scope, and trade-offs (distinct from formal ownership assignment).

indicators.label: Cross-functional kickoff completed
indicators.help_text: A formal kickoff involving business, technology, governance, and operations has occurred.

indicators.label: Engineering / platform teams engaged
indicators.help_text: Engineering dependencies are acknowledged and platform teams are formally engaged.

indicators.label: Governance / risk / legal engaged
indicators.help_text: Governance, risk, and legal stakeholders are formally engaged in scope and review.

indicators.label: Success metrics documented and agreed
indicators.help_text: A documented, agreed-upon set of success metrics exists across stakeholder groups.

dimensions.name: Operational Ownership Clarity
dimensions.operational_definition: Clarity regarding long-term ownership, accountability, escalation responsibility, operational support, and lifecycle management for the AI initiative.

indicators.label: Business owner formally assigned
indicators.help_text: A named business owner is formally accountable for the initiative's operational outcomes.

indicators.label: Technical owner formally assigned
indicators.help_text: A named technical owner is formally accountable for the platform, model, and integrations.

indicators.label: Escalation workflow documented
indicators.help_text: Clear escalation paths, response time expectations, and decision rights are documented.

indicators.label: Operational support model defined
indicators.help_text: Tiered support model (L1/L2/L3), staffing, and SLAs are defined.

indicators.label: Post-launch lifecycle review cadence
indicators.help_text: Recurring post-launch reviews assess performance, drift, and retirement criteria.

dimensions.name: Cross-Functional Coordination
dimensions.operational_definition: Organization's ability to coordinate execution, dependencies, communication, sequencing, and operational collaboration across multiple teams and business functions.

indicators.label: Dependency mapping completed
indicators.help_text: Upstream and downstream dependencies have been formally mapped.

indicators.label: Cross-functional governance cadence exists
indicators.help_text: Recurring cross-functional working sessions are scheduled and attended.

indicators.label: Delivery sequencing documented
indicators.help_text: Sequencing of deliverables, integration points, and gating criteria is documented.

indicators.label: Downstream workflow impacts documented
indicators.help_text: Operational workflow changes and their impacts on existing processes are documented.

indicators.label: Cross-team escalation coordination defined
indicators.help_text: Process for coordinating escalations across teams is defined and rehearsed.

dimensions.name: Training & Enablement Readiness
dimensions.operational_definition: Organization's preparedness to train, support, onboard, and operationally enable users impacted by the AI initiative.

indicators.label: User training plan documented
indicators.help_text: A documented training plan for impacted users covering modality, sequencing, and reinforcement.

indicators.label: Operational documentation prepared
indicators.help_text: User guides, FAQs, and operational runbooks are prepared and reviewed.

indicators.label: Support resources allocated
indicators.help_text: Dedicated support staff, tooling, and queues are allocated for the rollout.

indicators.label: User feedback process identified
indicators.help_text: A mechanism for capturing, triaging, and acting on user feedback exists.

indicators.label: Adoption reinforcement plan established
indicators.help_text: Ongoing reinforcement activities (refresher training, nudges, champions) are planned.

blockers.label: No business owner assigned
blockers.message: No business owner is formally assigned. Production deployment is blocked until accountability is established.
blockers.remediation: Formally assign a named business owner with documented accountability for operational outcomes.

blockers.label: No technical owner assigned
blockers.message: No technical owner is formally assigned. Production deployment is blocked until platform accountability is established.
blockers.remediation: Formally assign a named technical owner accountable for platform, model lifecycle, and integrations.

blockers.label: No escalation path documented
blockers.message: No documented escalation workflow exists. Initiative is constrained to pilot scope until escalation is formalized.
blockers.remediation: Document escalation paths, response time expectations, and decision rights before broader rollout.

blockers.label: No governance review cadence
blockers.message: No governance review cadence is established. Remediation is required before deployment proceeds.
blockers.remediation: Establish a recurring governance review cadence with named decision-makers and decision rights.

blockers.label: No user training plan
blockers.message: No user training plan exists. Production deployment is blocked until user enablement is planned.
blockers.remediation: Document a user training plan covering modality, sequencing, and reinforcement for impacted users.
